item.title: About
item.description:
Hey, I’m Ezra, a Mobile Engineer and an indie developer who loves working on open source projects and contributing to them outside of work.

What I do

I specialize in building Android apps with Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture and Kotlin. I care a lot about writing code that scales, is testable and easy for other engineers to work with.

I also maintain the Translate Android SDK on Maven Central — a modular translation SDK with optional voice (TTS/STT) and camera (ML Kit OCR) plugins. I do write about Android patterns, SDKs and Kotlin on Medium.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Translate Android SDK

Kotlin · Jetpack Compose · Maven Central · ML Kit

A lightweight multi-module Android SDK for integrating powerful text translation built on the TranslatePlus API. Supports single text, batch, subtitle, email and HTML translation with an optional Jetpack Compose UI module included out of the box.

  • Single text, batch, subtitle, email and HTML translation
  • Optional pre-built Compose UI module with full slot API customization
  • Optional voice (TTS/STT) and camera (ML Kit OCR) plugins
  • Published on Maven Central

GitHub · Maven Central
